title: 有馬記念の後に・All Eyez On Me

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse boils over with excitement. The
noise is cacophonous, but it stands as proof of my
impact on the audience. */

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Haha... How's that for proof, dummy?
